apps.page.title: App Marketplace
apps.page.subtitle: Browse, install, run, and manage Jetson apps and examples
apps.banner.title: APP MARKET for one-click Jetson demos
apps.msg.remote_required.title: Remote Connection Required
apps.msg.remote_required.body: Running on PC. Connect to a Jetson device on the Remote page before install/deploy.
apps.msg.l4t_detect_failed.title: L4T Detection Failed
apps.msg.l4t_detect_failed.body:
Failed to read current device L4T version. Compatibility check skipped.

{name} supported versions: {versions}
apps.msg.l4t_incompatible.title: L4T Version Not Compatible
apps.msg.no_exec_cmd: '{name}' has no executable command configured yet.
apps.msg.confirm_clean.title: Confirm Clean
apps.msg.no_uninstall_cmd: '{name}' has no uninstall command configured yet.
apps.msg.confirm_uninstall.title: Confirm Uninstall
apps.dialog.background.title: Minimize to Background
apps.dialog.background.body:
{name} will continue running in the background.

Click the status bar at the top to restore this window.
apps.dialog.cancel.title: Cancel Operation?
apps.dialog.cancel.body:
{name} is still running.

Closing will stop the process.
apps.item.jtop.name: jtop Monitor
apps.item.jtop.desc: jetson-stats system monitor for real-time GPU / CPU / memory usage
apps.item.jupyter.name: Jupyter Lab
apps.item.jupyter.desc: Interactive Python development environment with GPU monitoring plugin support
apps.item.nodered.name: Node-RED
apps.item.nodered.desc: Visual flow orchestration tool for IoT and edge computing scenarios
apps.item.yolov26_dual_gmsl.name: YOLOv26 Dual GMSL
apps.item.yolov26_dual_gmsl.desc: YOLOv26 TensorRT vision system for dual GMSL cameras, running detection, pose, and segmentation inference.
apps.item.jx_audiocraft.name: Audiocraft
apps.item.jx_audiocraft.desc: Launch `audiocraft` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_comfyui.name: ComfyUI
apps.item.jx_comfyui.desc: Launch `comfyui` from jetson-examples. Disk 30GB. RAM 15GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_deep_live_cam.name: Deep Live Cam
apps.item.jx_deep_live_cam.desc: Launch `deep-live-cam` from jetson-examples. Disk 40GB. RAM 20GB. JetPack/L4T 36.3.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything.name: Depth Anything
apps.item.jx_depth_anything.desc: Launch `depth-anything` from jetson-examples. Disk 20GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v2.name: Depth Anything V2
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v2.desc: Launch `depth-anything-v2` from jetson-examples. Disk 15GB. RAM 4GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0.
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v3.name: Depth Anything V3
apps.item.jx_depth_anything_v3.desc: Follow official full tutorial flow: install jetson-examples, run reComputer demo, enter container, build engine, and run USB camera demo.
apps.item.jx_gpt_oss.name: GPT-OSS
apps.item.jx_gpt_oss.desc: Launch `gpt-oss` from jetson-examples. Disk 50GB. RAM 14GB. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.

apps.item.jx_ros1_jp6.name: ROS 1 Noetic (JP6)
apps.item.jx_ros1_jp6.desc: Install ROS 1 Noetic Docker image from the built-in OneDrive archive. Import image as `ros:noetic`. Verify with `rosversion -d`. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_ros2_humble_jp6.name: ROS 2 Humble (JP6)
apps.item.jx_ros2_humble_jp6.desc: Install ROS 2 Humble Hawksbill natively via apt on Ubuntu 22.04 (JetPack 6). Installs ros-humble-desktop. Verify with `ros2 --version`. JetPack/L4T 36.4.0, 36.4.3, 36.4.4.
apps.item.jx_sheared_llama_2_7b_sharegpt: Launch `Sheared-LLaMA-2.7B-ShareGPT` from jetson-examples. Disk 25GB. RAM 7GB. JetPack/L4T 35.3.1, 35.4.1, 35.5.0, 36.3.0.
